structurePatterns: Selected = outer ring stays border color, inner dot = 6px ink-primary (#262626) — NOT blue
Disabled = quaternary ink (#C4C4C4) for both ring and dot
Label = body text (14px) to the right, 8px gap (--space-2)
usageHints: Use for mutually exclusive selection within a group
At least 2 options in a group — never a standalone radio
Selected indicator is INK dot, not accent blue
doNotInvent: Button-group style radio — use Segmented Control instead
unknowns: Radio group vertical vs horizontal layout spacing
